title: Enforce Workspace Import Boundaries
forbids: cross-project imports that violate docs/projects/habitat-harness/taxonomy.md §3 or bypass package entrypoints with relative/absolute project imports
why: Project-plane architecture is graph law in H3: every workspace package carries kind:* tags and the tag constraints lock with an empty baseline.
message: Fix the import edge or revise taxonomy.md and the boundary configuration together with recorded provenance; do not weaken the boundary config ad hoc.
